metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop advanced sewing and textile skills through pattern making, garment construction, and textile science. This course explores fashion design, textile properties, and the technical and creative aspects of clothing and textile production.
metadata.general_description: An applied course in advanced sewing, pattern making, textile science, and fashion design.

big_ideas.statement: Textiles are created from fibres through processes that affect their properties, performance, and environmental impact.
big_ideas.elaboration: Understanding fibre types, yarn construction, and weaving/knitting processes enables selection of appropriate materials for design purposes.

big_ideas.statement: Pattern making and garment construction require technical knowledge, precision, and problem-solving to transform designs into wearable clothing.
big_ideas.elaboration: Proficiency in patternwork and sewing techniques enables designers to realize their creative visions with quality and fit.

big_ideas.statement: Fashion design and clothing choices reflect personal identity, cultural values, and social contexts.
big_ideas.elaboration: Understanding fashion as both functional and expressive enables creative design while respecting diverse clothing practices and traditions.

big_ideas.statement: The textile industry has significant economic, environmental, and social impacts that require sustainable and ethical practices.
big_ideas.elaboration: Awareness of textile production impacts inspires responsible consumption and design practices that consider environmental and labour concerns.

competencies.raw: Design clothing and textile products that meet functional and aesthetic requirements
i_can_statements: I can sketch and develop design concepts for clothing
I can select fabrics and materials appropriate for design purposes
I can design for specific fit, body types, and functional needs
I can create designs considering aesthetic principles and trends

competencies.raw: Create patterns and plan garment construction processes
i_can_statements: I can draft basic patterns for various garment types
I can grade patterns for different sizes
I can plan construction sequences for complex garments
I can modify patterns to accommodate design variations

competencies.raw: Plan textile and fashion projects considering constraints and resources
i_can_statements: I can estimate fabric requirements for projects
I can plan efficient use of materials and resources
I can develop project timelines and work plans
I can design projects considering skill level and tool availability

competencies.raw: Evaluate textile and garment quality and recommend improvements
i_can_statements: I can assess garment fit and construction quality
I can identify areas for design and construction improvement
I can compare textile properties and performance
I can evaluate designs for functionality and aesthetics

competencies.raw: Execute advanced sewing techniques with accuracy and precision
i_can_statements: I can construct seams using various techniques and stitches
I can insert zippers, buttons, and closures
I can attach collars, cuffs, and waistbands
I can hand-finish hems and hand-sew details

competencies.raw: Apply pattern making and garment construction skills
i_can_statements: I can lay out patterns efficiently on fabric
I can cut fabric accurately following pattern marks
I can construct garments following sequential steps
I can fit and adjust garments for proper fit

competencies.raw: Select and prepare fabrics and materials appropriately
i_can_statements: I can identify fabric types and properties
I can prepare fabrics through shrinking and straightening
I can match prints and patterns in layout
I can select trims and notions appropriate for designs

competencies.raw: Complete garments with professional finishing and attention to detail
i_can_statements: I can finish raw edges appropriately for fabric type
I can press and finish garments professionally
I can add closures and fastenings securely
I can perform quality checks and repairs

competencies.raw: Operate sewing machines and textile equipment safely and effectively
i_can_statements: I can maintain and troubleshoot sewing machines
I can operate sergers and overlock machines
I can use specialized sewing machine presser feet
I can use pressing equipment and steam tools

competencies.raw: Use digital tools for pattern making and design
i_can_statements: I can use pattern design software
I can create digital designs and grading
I can access and modify digital pattern libraries
I can use digital tools for fabric selection and visualization

competencies.raw: Apply textile science understanding to material selection and care
i_can_statements: I can understand fibre properties and performance
I can select fabrics based on intended use
I can understand fabric finishing and treatments
I can recommend appropriate care and maintenance

competencies.raw: Evaluate emerging textile technologies and sustainable practices
i_can_statements: I can assess sustainable fibre and fabric options
I can understand textile dyeing and finishing technologies
I can identify eco-friendly production practices
I can evaluate technology innovations in textiles

areas.name: Textile Science and Fibres
topics: Natural fibres: cotton, wool, silk, linen, plant-based fibres
Synthetic fibres: polyester, nylon, acrylic, spandex
Weaving, knitting, and other fabric formation processes

areas.name: Pattern Making and Garment Construction
topics: Basic pattern drafting and block patterns
Construction methods for different garment types

areas.name: Fashion Design and Aesthetics
topics: Fashion history and cultural clothing traditions
Design principles: colour, proportion, balance, emphasis
